reason: This video collection consists of medical imaging (CT/MRI scans), equipment setup photos, and a title slide for 'Exceptional Endoscopy MCG Urology Training.' None of these frames show an actual FLS task performance. The imaging scans appear to be diagnostic imaging unrelated to FLS training. The operational/setup photos show laparoscopic equipment in a clinical setting, not a standardized FLS trainer box or task execution. The title slide is instructional/promotional content.
notes: No FLS task (peg transfer, pattern cut, endoloop, extracorporeal suture, or intracorporeal suture) is visible or being performed in any frame. Content appears to be either medical imaging documentation or clinical endoscopy equipment setup, not FLS skills training.
